channel.title: Civil Rights on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Civil Rights on Have an average day :|

item.title: Preacher gives interesting gay rights speech - YouTube
item.description: Watch the entire video. This is great! I love it!! Preacher gives interesting gay rights speech – YouTube.

item.title: I just learned I'm a closet homosexual...
item.description: Thanks Internet for telling me I’m a closet homosexual and I never knew I was! Gotta love free speech, even for dumb-asses. Otherwise how else would I get my comedy? In all seriousness though these people kind of deserve to step on a lego.

item.title: JC Penny taking a stand on civil rights.
item.description: Wow, this is really awesome. I’m glad to see civil rights progressing like this. JC Penny taking a stand on civil rights.http://joemygod.blogspot.com/2012/05/jcpenney-launches-fathers-day-ad.html

item.title: Republican Chokes Up At Gay Marriage Debate In Washington - YouTube
item.description: She nailed it. Republican Chokes Up At Gay Marriage Debate In Washington – YouTube.
